price: an jenem Tag nun werden nach ihrer Sünde weder Mensch noch Gänn gefragt.
arabic: فَيَوۡمَئِذٖ لَّا يُسۡـَٔلُ عَن ذَنۢبِهِۦٓ إِنسٞ وَلَا جَآنّٞ

version.title: German Translation - Bubenheim
version.description: Translation of the Quran meanings into German by Abdullah As-Samit (Frank Bubenheim) and Dr. Nadeem Elyas

meta.transliteration: fayawma-idhin lā yus'alu ʿan dhanbihi insun walā jānnun
